summary: Event filter query params (type, dateFrom, dateTo, city) added to GET /events and GET /events/upcoming via api-gateway passthrough and Prisma WHERE logic in events-ms. GET /users/:id confirmed protected by global FirebaseAuthGuard. 8 unit tests (5 required + 3 extra) all pass. No schema migration. No new env vars.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: All 6 code files modified/created plus backend.md handoff

qualityGates.name: tests_passed_or_accepted
qualityGates.notes: 8 unit tests pass: TC-1 no filters, TC-2 type-only, TC-3 date-range (gte+lte combined), TC-4 city ILIKE, TC-5 combined (type+dateFrom+city), TC-6 findUpcoming default date, TC-7 findUpcoming type, TC-8 findUpcoming dateFrom override

qualityGates.name: security_checks
qualityGates.notes: GET /events and /events/upcoming protected by global FirebaseAuthGuard (APP_GUARD). GET /users/:id: already existed and protected. Filter params validated via class-validator on EventFilterDto. ParseUUIDPipe on user ID prevents injection.

qualityGates.name: backward_compatibility
qualityGates.notes: All filter params optional; empty filters produce WHERE {} returning all events — existing behavior preserved

qualityGates.name: no_schema_migration
qualityGates.notes: No Prisma schema changes. Query-level only.

qualityGates.name: no_env_changes
qualityGates.notes: No new env vars added. .env.template files unchanged.
